Task involves 5 files, multiple Java modernization patterns, maintaining test passing. Complexity is multi-file refactoring with 6 different modernization types, which is consistent with medium difficulty

privileged_info_summary: The modernize_java_syntax task is a synthetic Java refactoring exercise. It creates a legacy Java project with 5 source files configured for Java 17. The project contains: 3 anonymous inner classes (Comparator, Runnable, Consumer) that must be converted to lambda expressions; 1 Iterator loop that must be converted to streams or enhanced for-loops; 2 nested try-finally blocks with manual close() calls that must use try-with-resources; 1 switch statement that must become a switch expression; and 1 multi-line string concatenation that must become a text block. The test suite has 4 test cases that verify the functionality of all refactored code remains correct. All Java 17 features required (lambdas introduced Java 8, try-with-resources Java 7, switch expressions Java 14, text blocks Java 15) are available.
